title: Yoshiyuki Kotani
text: Home * People * Yoshiyuki Kotani Yoshiyuki Kotani [1] Yoshiyuki Kotani , a Japanese mathematician, computer scientist and professor at Department of Computer Science, Tokyo University of Agriculture and Technology . His research interests include natural language processing , computer vision , machine learning , and computer games with focus on Shogi . He is co-author of the Shogi program Mattari Yuuchan , Bronze medal winner in Minishogi at the 17th Computer Olympiad in Yokohama 2013. Yoshiyuki Kotani is further maze and puzzle designer [2] [3] , and worked on the problem of domino tilings of polyominoes [4] .
